title: atalantia disticha
intro: Atalantia disticha, also known as the Chinese box orange or Chinese orange, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Atalantia disticha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various types of infections, as well as its ability to exhibit neuroprotective and cardioprotective effects. Atalantia disticha can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
